name: Baked Harvest Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Varietal non-sparkling white or pink grape juice
3 cups Unpeeled yams, cut into 1.5-inch chunks
3 cups Unpeeled carrots, cut into 1.5-inch slices
3 cups Unpeeled parsnips, cut into 1.5-inch slices
3 cups Peeled onions, cut into 1.5-inch wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Place the first 6 ingredients into a stainless steel or cast iron pot. Cover with a tight-fitting lid and bake for 60 minutes.
3. Add the celery. Continue baking for 30 more minutes.
4. Remove from oven. Place pot on medium heat on stove and bring to a boil.
5. Mix the 1/3 cup water and arrowroot together until smooth. Pour into the vegetable mixture, stirring constantly until it thickens and becomes clear. Turn off heat.
6. Garnish with 1/4 cup fresh parsley, minced.
Yield: 6-8 servings
Per Serving: 229 cal, 5 g protein, 0 g fat, 53 g carbohydrates, 0 chol
